step_rationale: Lipid-droplet protein conferring cardioprotection and reducing myocardial infarction risk.
mechanism: PLIN1 (perilipin-1) regulates myocardial lipid homeostasis and provides cardioprotection by reducing ischemic injury.

references.title: PLIN1 Haploinsufficiency Causes a Favorable Metabolic Profile.
references.journal: The Journal of clinical endocrinology and metabolism
